title: papaver rubroaurantiacum subsp. saichanense
intro: Papaver rubroaurantiacum subsp. saichanense is a rare and lesser-known species of poppy, belonging to the Papaveraceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include relief from pain, inflammation, and spasms, as well as its potential to aid in sleep and relaxation. Papaver rubroaurantiacum subsp. saichanense is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried root powder for medicinal use.
